entries.d: n. a man who is the lover of a girl or young woman

When a female you are interested in casually reveals that she has a boyfriend (intentionally or otherwise).
> I was about to ask her out but then she dropped the boyfriend bomb.

Subtly adding the fact that you have a boyfriend into the conversation in order to deter anyone who is potentially interested. The first time this happens is the boyfriend drop. Also can be used in describing this event by the other person who was interested.\r
\r
Related to [girlfriend drop].
> Harvey: 'She boyfriend dropped in our last conversation but I'm still interested.'
